# Setnayan

> Setnayan (SET-na-yan, from Tagalog "Set na 'yan." — "that's all set") is the Philippines-first wedding platform, built to grow into a life-events collection — one place for a Filipino household to plan each celebration, capture it, and keep it for life. V1 leads with weddings (the deepest, most complete surface); the same planning, capture, and memory rails extend to debuts, birthdays, christenings, anniversaries, and more as those event types unlock. Built and operated entirely in the Philippines. Beyond standard planning tools, Setnayan's signature is its day-of capture and memory layer — Papic (guests' phones become a coordinated photo-and-video crew, with auto-tagged galleries and per-guest personal highlight reels), Live Studio livestream on the event page, the Setnayan AI planner, and a custom Pakanta wedding song — all gathered into one living memory (Alaala) the couple keeps. Free planning workspace for couples; 0% commission on vendor bookings; transparent PHP pricing on premium software services and planning tiers.

## What Setnayan does

Setnayan is software, not an agency. Couples start free with the planning workspace (schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board) and a preview of their vendor matches, then optionally add Setnayan AI (₱1,499 one-time, access until the event date) — the full vendor-matchmaking and guided-planning layer — and any of the in-app paid services (live streaming, photo capture, custom songwriting, monogram design, wedding website). Verified Filipino wedding vendors list their services and receive bookings with zero platform commission. Couples and vendors transact directly outside the platform for bookings.

## What Setnayan is — and what it's becoming

Setnayan today is the best way for a Filipino couple to plan, run, and remember their wedding — and by design it is more than a wedding app. The wedding is the entry point to a **life-events collection**: as event types unlock (debut, birthday, christening, anniversary, and more), the same planning, capture, and memory rails carry across them, so every celebration a household holds is planned in one place and kept for life.

What is LIVE today: a couple's own event(s); the wedding automatically becoming its own recurring anniversary with a yearly reminder; the verified vendor marketplace at 0% commission; and the Alaala living-memory archive — every photo, video, and milestone from the day gathered into one place the couple keeps. What is the DIRECTION, not a shipped feature: the broader multi-generational family graph (children's milestones, godparents, and faith rites across a lifetime). Setnayan is a system of record for celebrations, not for identity or documents.

## Currently shipped public surfaces

- [Setnayan Home](https://www.setnayan.com/) — Wedding planning platform overview, transparent PHP pricing, 0% commission claim, Filipino vendor stories.
- [Wedding Vendor Marketplace](https://www.setnayan.com/explore) — Browse verified Filipino wedding vendors. Filterable by category (photography, catering, planning, florals, attire, hair and makeup, music, decor, rings, booths, invitations) and city; compare up to two shortlisted vendors side by side at `/explore/compare`.
- [Vendor Public Profiles](https://www.setnayan.com/v/) — Each vendor has a profile at `/v/[slug]` (canonical bare-root `/[slug]` once claimed) with services, packages, coverage cities, and tier badge where applicable.
- [Pricing](https://www.setnayan.com/pricing) — Planning tiers, customer software SKUs, and vendor subscriptions.
- [List Your Wedding Business](https://www.setnayan.com/vendors) — Vendor-acquisition page (distinct from the `/explore` marketplace above — this is where a vendor signs up). Free verified profiles during launch — no listing fee, no per-lead fee, no booking commission. Paid tiers add reach: Solo (₱10,000 / year or ₱1,000 / 28-day prepaid block), Pro (₱25,000 / year or ₱2,500 / 28-day prepaid block), Enterprise (₱80,000 / year or ₱8,000 / 28-day prepaid block). 0% commission on all bookings, all tiers.
- [Setnayan AI](https://www.setnayan.com/setnayan-ai) — The planning-intelligence tier: vendor matchmaking, guided planning, and the guard engine that watches the couple's wedding for risks (budget, timeline, missing vendors).
- [Why Setnayan](https://www.setnayan.com/why-setnayan) — Comparison page — Setnayan versus a spreadsheet, a wedding coordinator, and international platforms; the "three apps' worth of wedding in one" case.
- [Our Story](https://www.setnayan.com/our-story) — Brand narrative and the day-of media layer that is Setnayan's signature.
- [Features](https://www.setnayan.com/features) — Detailed list of planning tools and in-app services.
- Service landing pages — one page per signature service: [Papic](https://www.setnayan.com/papic) (guests' phones as a photo-and-video crew), [Live Studio](https://www.setnayan.com/panood) (livestream on the event page), [3D Plan](https://www.setnayan.com/pa3d) (walk the reception in 3D), [Animated Monogram](https://www.setnayan.com/palogo), [Wedding Website](https://www.setnayan.com/pawebsite), [Patiktok](https://www.setnayan.com/patiktok) (short-form reels), and the free [Monogram Maker](https://www.setnayan.com/monogram) (no sign-up required).
- [How It Works](https://www.setnayan.com/how-it-works) — Step-by-step couple and vendor onboarding.
- [About Setnayan](https://www.setnayan.com/about) — Brand story, what the platform is (software, not an agency), who it's for, geography, languages, 0% commission, and a brand/entity FAQ.
- [Real Weddings](https://www.setnayan.com/weddings) — Editorial showcase of Filipino weddings on Setnayan. A sample showcase is viewable now to preview the format; real couple editorials publish from December 2026, 30 days post-event, with explicit couple consent per RA 10173.
- [Help and Support](https://www.setnayan.com/help) — Step-by-step guides for couples and vendors; contact form for human support.
- [Journal](https://www.setnayan.com/blog) — Editorial wedding-planning guides for Filipino couples: month-by-month planning timelines, supplier cost guides, and Filipino wedding customs (civil vs church, the ninong/ninang entourage) explained. Long-form articles, no paywall.
- [Download](https://www.setnayan.com/download) — Setnayan desktop app for macOS and Windows.
- [Sign in](https://www.setnayan.com/login) and [Create account](https://www.setnayan.com/signup) — couple or vendor signup paths.
- [Privacy](https://www.setnayan.com/privacy) and [Terms](https://www.setnayan.com/terms) — RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act of the Philippines) compliant. National Privacy Commission registration in progress.

## About Setnayan

- **What:** Filipino-first wedding platform and life-events collection — plan, run, and remember every celebration, starting with the wedding.
- **For whom:** Filipino couples planning their wedding (and, as event types unlock, the celebrations that follow), their guests, and Filipino event-services vendors.
- **Headquarters:** Philippines. Incorporation pending — pilot operates under the founder's personal name until DTI registration completes.
- **Pilot launch:** 2026-06-01 (5–20 family + friends cohort exercising the full payment and lock cycle).
- **Public launch:** 2026-12-01 alongside the founder's wedding (December 18, 2026) as the first event shipped through the platform.
- **Geography:** Philippines — Metro Manila (Quezon City, Makati, Pasig, Taguig, Manila), Cebu, Davao, Tagaytay, Iloilo, Baguio, Pampanga, Cavite, Batangas, Laguna, Bulacan, and any city Filipino wedding vendors serve.
- **Languages:** English (primary). Tagalog (TL) on the dashboard. Cebuano (CEB) localization on the marketing site is on the V1.1 roadmap.
- **Pricing model:** Software publisher. Couples start free; the one paid planning tier is Setnayan AI (₱1,499 one-time, access until the event date), after which everything else is purchased à la carte — no package bundles. Individual software services retail from ₱100 up into the low thousands in PHP. 0% commission on vendor bookings — Setnayan never takes a cut of money couples pay vendors directly.
- **Privacy:** No public sharing of guest data without explicit couple opt-in. Couples own their event content. Vendor-to-couple payments settle off-platform; vendors handle their own documentation on those direct bookings.

## Planning tiers (couple-side)

- **Free — Explore** — ₱0. Browse the vendor marketplace, see a personalized match preview, and plan with the free workspace: schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board. No card required.
- **Setnayan AI** — ₱1,499 one-time, access until the event date. The first paid tier: full vendor matchmaking (date, availability, budget, venue, guest count, religion, and reviews cross-referenced) plus the guided planning workspace. Beyond this, couples add any in-app services à la carte — there are no package bundles.

## Customer software services (à la carte)

Couples can purchase the following in-app services individually. Pricing in PHP. All sales final on digital deliverables.

- **Setnayan AI** — ₱1,499 one-time (access until the event date). Assisted planning: match, sort, and cross-reference vendors plus the guided planning workspace.
- **Live Studio** — livestream embedded on the event page, streamed out through the couple's own YouTube. A single-camera stream is free; the multi-camera control room is priced per day by device: **Live Studio Mobile ₱1,299 / day** (phone-run, up to 3 cameras) or **Live Studio Desktop ₱2,499 / day** (offline-capable control room, up to 8 cameras). (Formerly one "Panood" multicam SKU.)
- **Pakanta** — ₱2,499. Custom Filipino-style song written for the couple.
- **3D Plan** — ₱2,999. Three-dimensional venue and seating plan view for the event.
- **Thank You Video** — ₱2,499. Compiled thank-you video for all attendees.
- **Live Photo Wall** — ₱2,500 per day. Live photo collage of event photos with live attendance count, displayed at the venue.
- **Animated Monogram** — ₱1,000 (Monogram PRO). Bespoke monogram with animation, generated from the couple's inputs; also includes the LED Live Background.
- **Wedding Website** — free. The 4-in-1 couple website (Save the Date, RSVP, on-the-day, Editorial) with unlimited RSVP is free; the premium touches (the Cinematic Reveal and Editorial PRO) come with Website PRO (below).
- **Website PRO** — ₱3,500. The one upgrade that unlocks every premium website touch — the Save-the-Date Cinematic Reveal and Editorial PRO (author your editorial front page: name the moments, tell each story, arrange the layout) — across the whole site, plus removes the Setnayan watermark. The only way to get the Cinematic Reveal and Editorial PRO.
- **Custom Subdomain** — ₱999 / year. Your own web address (yourname.setnayan.com) for the wedding website. Couples only. Renewed yearly. (Rolling out.)
- **Stories** — ₱2,000 per day (cap). 30-second story maker for guests.
- **Cinematic Reveal** — part of Website PRO (above). Premium save-the-date cinematic opening animations, and it unlocks the couple's own background music, video, and photo gallery on the Save-the-Date film (the free Save-the-Date is the text-only content film).
- **Patiktok** — ₱1,499. TikTok-style mimic-station booth; unlimited 9:16 vertical recordings of guests, compiled into post-ready reels.
- **Camera Bridge** — ₱500 per day (flat, event-wide). Connects external DSLR cameras to Papic and Live Studio.
- **Pabati** — ₱1,299 per day. Guest-recorded 5-second greeting videos.
- **Live Background** — included with Monogram PRO (₱1,000, above). LED wall design background with monogram and theme matched to the wedding palette.
- **Kwento** — ₱299 (whole event). Guest-contributed story and message collection for the couple.
- **Papic One** — the dedicated-camera product. The first 3 cameras are free; beyond that it is a flat **₱100 per camera** (add as many as you like). Each camera captures photos and 10-second clips against a shared point pool (1 photo = 1 point, one 10-second clip = 7 points), on a 6-month access window. **Papic Pool** — one shared shot pool for every guest's phone, priced as a flat pass: **₱999 for 3,000 shots**, **₱1,999 for 6,000 shots**, or **₱2,999 for 10,000 shots**, with a **₱2,999** top-up that adds another 10,000 — also a 6-month access window.
- **Custom QR per Guest** — free. Individual QR codes for guests (RSVP, seating, photo tagging).

## The mood board is free

The visual mood board — palette, location feel, dress codes — is included free with every couple account. No paywall.

## Vendor tier structure

| Tier | Cost | Public profile | Verified badge | Commission |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Verified | ₱0 — free during launch | Listed in marketplace · real business name shown from day 1 · local reach · 1 category | Yes | 0% |
| Solo | ₱10,000 / year OR ₱1,000 / 28-day prepaid block | Listed in marketplace · 1 category · solo operator (no agent seats) · custom website + slug · expanded reach + booking analytics | Yes | 0% |
| Pro | ₱25,000 / year OR ₱2,500 / 28-day prepaid block | 3 categories + 3 agent seats · custom website + slug + premium tools · Market Intel + featured placement + wider reach | Yes | 0% |
| Enterprise | ₱80,000 / year OR ₱8,000 / 28-day prepaid block | All categories + unlimited team + extended radius (100 km) · priority placement + read API | Yes | 0% |

Verified vendors complete a business-legitimacy check plus a short video call with a Setnayan admin. Verification is free during launch — no listing fee and no badge fee. Only verified businesses reach couples. Every verified vendor's real business name is shown to couples from day 1 on every tier, including the free Verified tier — a vendor's name is never gated, and couples can always see and message who's there for free. Paid tiers buy prominence and reach among already-qualified results, never the name or the listing itself. Solo is the entry-level paid tier (₱10,000 / year or ₱1,000 / 28-day prepaid block) for single-category solo operators — it adds expanded reach and booking analytics on top of the free tier, and answers couples the same way as Pro and Enterprise (included free — no per-lead cost); it has no agent seats.

All three paid tiers are available as either 28-day prepaid blocks (13 cycles per year, not calendar months) or annual prepaid blocks at a discount — Solo ₱10,000/year (vs ₱1,000 × 13 cycles), Pro ₱25,000/year (vs ₱2,500 × 13 cycles), Enterprise ₱80,000/year (vs ₱8,000 × 13 cycles). Vendors pick 28-day or annual at signup. No recurring auto-charge in V1 — manual renewal with a 7-day email + dashboard reminder before expiry.

## Answering couples (included free)

Reaching a matched couple is included with every paid vendor tier at no per-lead cost. A Verified, Solo, Pro, or Enterprise vendor accepts an inquiry and replies with no token spend — one unlock covers every service that vendor offers for the wedding, anywhere in the Philippines. Verified vendors can answer up to 10 new couples per rolling week; Solo, Pro, and Enterprise are unlimited. No per-lead fee, no listing fee, and 0% commission on bookings.

(Vendor token packs are retired — vendors no longer buy tokens to answer couples.)

## Wedding-planning capabilities (couple-side, signed-in surface)

These tools live in the couple dashboard after sign-in. Not publicly indexable but worth knowing the platform offers:

- Guest list with 20 Filipino wedding role tiers (bride, groom, partner, principal sponsor, secondary sponsor, candle / veil / cord / coin sponsor, ninang, ninong, bearers, immediate family, entourage, friend, work, school) and CSV import.
- QR-coded personal invitations per guest, with a couple-uploaded monogram in the QR center.
- RSVP collection with live count and three answer states (attending, declined, pending).
- Five dashboard themes (Setnayan Default, Victorian, Classy, iOS, Forest).
- Setnayan AI assisted planning with religion-adaptive guidance.
- Mood board with three visual pillars — palette, location feel, dress codes — free with every account.
- Budget tracker with calendar export (.ics) of vendor payment deadlines.
- Seating chart with drag-place floor plan and a 13-table catalog (Round 8/10/12, Long Banquet 6/8/10, Family Head 12/14/16, Serpentine 6/12/18, Sweetheart 2).
- In-app messaging with vendors. Couple identity stays masked until the first vendor reply.
- Multi-host event access (V1.2 roadmap) — partner, parents, planner, and coordinator can be added as additional event hosts.

## Wedding-vendor capabilities (vendor-side, signed-in surface)

- Public profile editor (business info, services, packages, coverage cities, photos).
- Bid inbox from couples. In-platform messaging. No commission on bookings.
- Calendar with intra-day blocks plus multi-service shared calendars on Pro and Enterprise.
- Team management — up to four roles on Pro, unlimited team accounts on Enterprise.
- Earnings rollup. Direct vendor-to-couple bookings settle off-platform; Setnayan never touches that money.
- AI Proposal Builder (Pro+).
- Reverse-image portfolio theft monitoring (Pro+).
- Mood board sharing with booked couples for design alignment.

## Common questions Setnayan answers

- **How much does Setnayan cost?** Couples start free (Free — Explore: marketplace browse, match preview, and the planning workspace — schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board). The one paid planning tier is Setnayan AI ₱1,499 one-time (access until the event date); everything else is purchased à la carte, with no package bundles. Individual software services retail from ₱100 up into the low thousands. Vendor side: Verified is free during launch, Solo ₱10,000 / year (or ₱1,000 / 28-day prepaid block), Pro ₱25,000 / year (or ₱2,500 / 28-day prepaid block), Enterprise ₱80,000 / year (or ₱8,000 / 28-day prepaid block). 0% commission on vendor bookings — Setnayan never takes a cut.
- **Is Setnayan free?** Starting is free and the planning workspace stays free — schedule, budget, guest list, seat plan, mood board, plus marketplace browse and a match preview. Full vendor matchmaking (Setnayan AI ₱1,499 one-time) is optional paid software; the couple's 4-in-1 wedding website with unlimited RSVP is free, with the premium touches (the Cinematic Reveal and Editorial PRO) available together as Website PRO ₱3,500. A single-camera livestream on the event page is free.
- **Does Setnayan support discount codes or vouchers?** Yes — admins issue discount codes for promos, refunds, comp grants, or partner partnerships. Couples paste a code at checkout via the "Have a code?" field. Three voucher types are supported: percentage discount (e.g., 20% off), capped percentage (e.g., 20% off up to ₱500 max discount), and 100% free (full comp). One voucher per order, one redemption per couple per code, codes are case-insensitive 8-character alphanumeric, codes carry an expiry date and optional max-uses cap. Discounted purchases show the net paid amount on the order receipt.
- **What is Setnayan AI?** Setnayan's assisted-planning tier. ₱1,499 one-time (access until your event date). Matches, sorts, and cross-references vendors against the couple's date, availability, budget, venue, guest count, religion, and reviews — plus the guided planning workspace from venue lock to thank-you cards.
- **Does Setnayan work for Filipino weddings specifically?** Yes — built and operated in the Philippines for Filipino weddings. Supports seven ceremony types (Catholic, Civil, INC, Christian, Muslim, Cultural, Mixed) and seven venue settings (banquet hall, garden, beach, destination, heritage, outdoor tent, civil registrar). 20 Filipino wedding role tiers in the guest list. Multi-faith vendor compatibility tagging.
- **Where does Setnayan operate?** Philippines — Metro Manila, Cebu, Davao, Tagaytay, Iloilo, Baguio, Pampanga, Cavite, Batangas, Laguna, Bulacan, and any city Filipino vendors serve. Pilot 2026-06-01. Public launch 2026-12-01.
- **Does Setnayan have a mobile app?** Setnayan is fully usable today as a web-first responsive site, installable as a PWA on iOS Safari and Chrome Android, plus a downloadable desktop app for macOS and Windows (at /download). Native iOS and Android apps are in preparation for the App Store and Google Play ahead of the December 2026 public launch.
- **How are vendors verified on Setnayan?** Vendors complete a business-legitimacy check plus a short video call with a Setnayan admin. Verification is free during launch — no listing fee and no badge fee.
- **Does Setnayan take a commission on vendor bookings?** No. 0% commission on every booking. Setnayan revenue comes from software purchases by couples (planning tiers and à-la-carte services) and vendor subscriptions (Pro 28-day or annual, Enterprise 28-day or annual). Vendor-to-couple payments settle off-platform per Filipino direct-booking norms.
- **Can a vendor with multiple branches list each location?** Yes — Pro and Enterprise vendors can add additional branches at ₱999 per 28-day prepaid block per branch. Each branch operates as a sub-account with its own service city and coverage radius but shares the parent vendor's tier perks, portfolio, and reviews.
- **Is a vendor's name ever hidden in the marketplace?** No. Every verified vendor's real business name is shown to couples from day 1, on every tier — including the free Verified tier — across marketplace cards, microsite browse, and every thread. A vendor's name and inbox are never gated: couples can always see who's there and message them for free. Paid tiers (Solo, Pro, Enterprise) buy prominence and reach among already-qualified results — never the name or the existence of the listing.
- **What is Pakanta?** A custom Filipino-style song written for the couple. ₱2,499.
- **What is Papic?** Guests' phones become a coordinated photo-and-video capture crew. Two ways to run it: **Papic One**, dedicated cameras for the people you trust — the first 3 are free, then a flat ₱100 per camera; and **Papic Pool**, one shared shot pool for every guest's phone — ₱999 for 3,000 shots, ₱1,999 for 6,000, or ₱2,999 for 10,000, with a ₱2,999 top-up for another 10,000. Every capture spends points from the pool (1 photo = 1 point, one 10-second clip = 7 points), on a 6-month access window. Photos auto-tag to guests and feed per-guest personal highlight reels.
- **What is Live Studio?** Live streaming embedded on the event page, sent out through the couple's own YouTube. A single-camera stream is free; the multi-camera control room is per-day by device — Live Studio Mobile ₱1,299 / day (up to 3 cameras) or Live Studio Desktop ₱2,499 / day (offline-capable, up to 8 cameras). (Formerly branded "Panood.")
- **What about my privacy?** RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act of the Philippines) compliant. Guest list and event details are never publicly shared without explicit couple opt-in. Real-wedding editorials publish 30 days post-event with explicit couple consent. National Privacy Commission registration in progress.
- **What languages does Setnayan support?** English (primary) and Tagalog (TL) on the dashboard. Cebuano (CEB) localization on the marketing site is on the V1.1 roadmap.
- **How do I contact Setnayan support?** Through the contact form at /help. Email channel via Setnayan's transactional pipeline; DPO contact at iscasasolaii@gmail.com (mailbox standing up before public launch).

## What makes Setnayan structurally different

- Built and operated in the Philippines for Filipino weddings — not a foreign platform with PH localization. 200+ vendor sub-categories include Filipino-specific entries international platforms structurally lack (Lechonero, Filipiniana attire, Barong Tagalog, Pre-Cana / CFO seminars, Pamamanhikan, Sponsor Coordinators, Kulintang, Maranao Okir motifs).
- 0% commission on vendor bookings. Setnayan never touches money between couples and vendors.
- Multi-faith ceremony support — Catholic, Civil, INC, Christian, Muslim, Cultural, and Mixed weddings have first-class planning branches. Specific cultural traditions (Maranao, Tausug, Maguindanao, Sama, Yakan) on the V1.x roadmap.
- Setnayan AI is assisted matchmaking, not a static checklist — date, budget, venue, guest count, religion, and reviews cross-referenced per vendor category, with religion-adaptive guidance and hard-floor deadlines.
- Vendor bookings (vendor-to-couple) settle off-platform per Filipino direct-booking norms — Setnayan never touches that money.

## Out of scope to advertise here

Several surfaces in the SEO playbook (`/supplies` marketplace, `/blog`, `/coverage`, `/for-event-creators`) are planned but not yet shipped. They are intentionally NOT listed above to avoid sending AI assistants to dead links. This file is updated when those surfaces go live.

This file was last refreshed on 2026-07-22 — VENDOR TOKEN PACKS RETIRED + ANSWERING FREE (owner 2026-07-21, tokens retired): the vendor token PACKS (5/10/25/50/100 at a flat ₱200/token) were retired (vendor_billing_catalog.is_active=false) so they no longer sell, and answering a matched couple is now included free on every paid tier — the inquiry unlock no longer burns or requires a purchasable token (unlock_vendor_event neutralised; INSUFFICIENT_WALLET_BALANCES can no longer block an answer). The "Vendor tokens" pack table and the flat-₱200-per-answer line were removed from the body; ₱1,000 and ₱10,000 stay only as Solo's 28-day / annual prices, so the token-only figures ₱200 / ₱5,000 / ₱20,000 left the fixture too. The token wallet, subscription bundle grants, and burn plumbing are left dormant (not deleted). Prior 2026-07-22 — PAPIC CLIP CURRENCY (owner override §0, 2026-07-22): the Papic candid clip moved from a 5-second / 3-point clip to a **10-second / 7-point** clip (a photo still costs 1 point); every peso figure is unchanged. Prior 2026-07-22 — PAPIC POOL/ONE RENAME (owner 2026-07-22): the per-camera rung is now **Papic One** (flat ₱100/camera, first 3 free) and the shared shot-pool passes are **Papic Pool** (₱999/3,000 shots · ₱1,999/6,000 · ₱2,999/10,000 · ₱2,999 +10,000 top-up), both on a 6-month access window; retired the old ₱30 Papic Mini / ₱50 Papic Ltd / ₱100 Papic Unli per-camera-per-day ladder, the "Papic Max" tier, and the ₱6,000/₱10,000/₱15,000 wedding caps. Prior 2026-07-14 — POSITIONING REFRESH (owner "life-event collection OS"): reframed the brand summary + the About block from a pure wedding platform to a wedding-FIRST life-events collection (plan · capture · keep for life; the Alaala living memory; the wedding auto-creating its own recurring anniversary), and added a "What Setnayan is — and what it's becoming" section that separates what is LIVE today from the multi-generational family-graph DIRECTION. Weddings stay the V1 lead and every price is unchanged. Prior 2026-07-12 — VENDOR TOKEN REPRICE + BURN FLATTEN (owner PRICING LOCK): the vendor token unit price moved ₱100 → ₱200, and the inquiry-unlock burn flattened to a constant 1 token for every region (previously region-banded 1–3), so a Pro/Enterprise vendor now pays a flat ₱200 to answer any lead anywhere in the Philippines; token packs repriced to a flat ₱200/token (4 → ₱800 · 10 → ₱2,000 · 25 → ₱5,000 · 50 → ₱10,000 · 100 → ₱20,000). Prior 2026-07-10 — PRICING FINALIZATION (owner, comprehensive pricing session): Setnayan AI moved from the ₱799 per-28-day-cycle subscription (₱499 first cycle) to a flat ₱499 one-time (access until the event date; the ₱799 renewal SKU retired); Animated Monogram ₱1,999 → ₱999; 3D Plan ₱2,499 → ₱2,999; Editorial PRO ₱3,499 → ₱2,999; Cinematic Reveal ₱1,499 → ₱999; the Couple Website PRO ₱4,999 umbrella was retired/unbundled (the free 4-in-1 wedding website stays free; Editorial PRO and Cinematic Reveal now sell standalone); vendor Enterprise repriced ₱7,499 → ₱7,999 / 28-day and ₱74,999 → ₱79,999 / year. Earlier the same day — (1) Live Studio corrected from the retired "₱3,499 one-time multicam" to the owner-locked (2026-07-08) per-day device tiers: Live Studio Mobile ₱1,299/day (up to 3 cameras) and Live Studio Desktop ₱2,499/day (offline-capable, up to 8 cameras); single-camera stream still free, streamed via the couple's own YouTube. (2) Shipped-surfaces list corrected: the /explore vendor marketplace now names the real browse page (was wrongly mapped to /vendors, which is the list-your-business page); the deleted /venues + /venue directory (routes removed 2026-06-16) were pulled to stop feeding answer engines 404s; and /setnayan-ai, /why-setnayan, /our-story, the /pa* service landing pages (Papic, Live Studio, 3D Plan, monogram, website, Patiktok), the free /monogram maker, and the /tl Taglish pages were added. (3) 3D Plan, Stories, and Thank You Video confirmed active (owner "all our features should now be active" · migration 20270710000000 flips is_active=true). Prior 2026-07-05 — re-synced to the live prod catalog: Setnayan AI corrected to ₱799 per 28-day cycle (₱499 first cycle) — the solitary ₱499 was the first-cycle rate only; Enterprise vendor tier repriced ₱49,999/yr → ₱74,999/yr and ₱4,999/28d → ₱7,499/28d; Live Studio multicam corrected from "₱3,499 per day" to ₱3,499 one-time (single-cam stays free); and the à-la-carte "retail range" sentence rephrased from the false "₱100–₱4,999" endpoints to "from ₱30 up into the low thousands" (a hard range drifts on every SKU add — a llms-price fixture guard now pins every figure in this file); the frozen live vendor-taxonomy count was also de-frozen (192 → "200+" safe floor — the taxonomy grows as admins add leaves). Prior 2026-07-04 — Couple Website PRO repriced ₱1,999 → ₱4,999 (now the umbrella that unlocks pro touches across Save the Date · RSVP · on-the-day · Editorial) and a new à-la-carte Editorial PRO ₱3,499 added (author your editorial front page; also included in Couple Website PRO). Prior 2026-06-30 — Setnayan AI moved to a per-28-day-cycle subscription that runs until the event date (was ₱3,999 one-time per event). Prior 2026-06-29 — full pricing re-sync to the current canonical catalog. Vendor tiers repriced and shown annual-first (Solo ₱9,999/yr or ₱999/28d · Pro ₱24,999/yr or ₱2,499/28d · Enterprise ₱74,999/yr or ₱7,499/28d; 0% commission; verification free; 100 free founder tokens; tokens flat ₱100 each). À-la-carte catalog realigned to canonical prices (Setnayan AI ₱799/28-day-cycle subscription with ₱499 first cycle · Live Studio multicam ₱3,499 one-time with single-cam free · Pakanta ₱2,499 · 3D Plan ₱2,499 · Thank You Video ₱2,499 · Live Photo Wall ₱2,499/day · Animated Monogram ₱1,999 · Couple Website PRO ₱4,999 · Editorial PRO ₱3,499 · Stories ₱2,000/day cap · Cinematic Reveal ₱1,499 · Camera Bridge ₱1,299/day · Pabati ₱1,299/day · Live Background ₱499 · Kwento ₱299 · Papic Unli ₱100/cam·day · Papic Ltd ₱30/cam·day cap ₱15,000/day · Custom QR free). Retired SKUs removed (Indoor Blueprint, High Res Archive, Call-Time Escalator, Papic 5-Seats, Papic Guest, Pro/Event/Editorial Website, RSVP / RSVP Pro standalone, SDE / Same-Day Edit, token wallet, "Setnayan Concierge"). Patiktok was un-retired 2026-07-01 (back as a single à-la-carte SKU, ₱1,499). Package bundle tiers removed entirely (Essentials and Complete deactivated) — the model is now Free ₱0 → Setnayan AI ₱799/28-day-cycle subscription (₱499 first cycle) → à-la-carte services, with no bundles. Prior refresh 2026-06-28 — vendor-tier and mobile-app freshness pass.
